exploration_notes: Comprehensive onboarding document written to /workspace/kafka--3.9.0/logs/agent/onboarding.md covering: Gradle build system, broker startup via kafka.Kafka.main() with KafkaServer (ZK) and KafkaRaftServer/BrokerServer (KRaft) paths, module structure across 15+ modules, topic creation flow through ControllerApis->QuorumController->ReplicationControlManager (KRaft) and KafkaApis->ZkAdminManager (ZK), testing with JUnit 5/Mockito/QuorumTestHarness, configuration via ConfigDef in AbstractKafkaConfig
